special_mechanics.name: Base Running Speed
special_mechanics.description: Player-specific attribute affecting running speed on bases. Vince Coleman documented as fastest player in game; difficulty to catch stealing second base correlates with speed stat.

special_mechanics.name: Pitcher Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: As pitcher gets tired during game, ball speed decreases and steering control becomes harder. Starting pitchers have higher stamina than relievers.

tier_notes: T3 - Tier 3 qualitative/empirical data. Wikipedia source provides game design and gameplay mechanics but contains no documented physics parameters (sub-pixel precision, exact velocity values, acceleration rates, gravity constants, or jump physics). Movement is described in terms of character attributes and game mechanics only. Source is sports game focused, not physics-focused documentation.
sources_used: wikipedia: R.B.I. Baseball - Gameplay section and game description
